title: 安田記念の後に・俺流アクセルon！

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: This is it! This is the feelin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The second the race ends, Vodka steps up
proudly without even glancing at the results.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like she got that something she wanted.
Something even greater than a G1 race victory.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I did it, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yup. I leaned in, sped up, and let the wind take
me...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm good now. If I can run like this, I'll shine
brighter than anyone, anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: And not just in mile races, but any distance.
choice_data_list: Even in medium or long-distance races?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, these legs are really workin' for me now.
They're pretty fearsome weapons.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Think about it. I've got the edge to beat even the
milers who always go on about their speed.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Put me in medium- or long-distance races, where
everyone's tired in the homestretch, and my
results'll be even better.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'll take 'em all down in a second. I'm not gonna
lose to anyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka stares fearlessly at the sky. The sharp look
in her eyes sends a shiver down my spine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without a doubt, Vodka has surpassed herself
and reached a whole new level.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Now I can stand tall in front of any opponent, no matter how strong. Even her.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer? Which G1 do you think Scarlet's
gonna go for this fall?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking about her personality, Scarlet likes
standing out and being number one. On top of
that, her legs are strong, so she's not worried
about distance...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That's what I was thinkin' too. Great minds think
alike, eh?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
In that case, that'll be our decidin' race this
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Lemme run in the autumn Tenno Sho. I wanna get
that ultimate title as the ultimate coolest me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You know what's what, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
No matter how prestigious the race, I'm not
afraid, You know why?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Cause everyone here's loved me since I ran in the
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Until next time, Tokyo Racecourse!
